NPC Behavior In Faction Territory: Attack on sight. Bounty posted — independent NPCs may attack for the reward. Faction raid timer halves.
NPC Behavior Outside Faction Territory: Patrols and assassins hunt you across the map. Faction Captains may stalk your camp.
Player Privileges: None. All faction shops and quests refuse you. Pledged followers of this faction will desert you.
Notes: The terminal hostile state. Reaching Hated triggers a one-time bounty event: the faction sends a named hunter for you within 3 in-game days.

NPC Behavior In Faction Territory: Attack on sight; will not break off until you flee territory.
NPC Behavior Outside Faction Territory: Will not engage outside their territory but flag you to nearby faction NPCs (debuff to other factions' rep gain near them).
Player Privileges: No dialog. No trade. No quests. Faction Embassies refuse entry.
Notes: Default state for the two natural enemies of any faction you pledge to. Reaching Hostile is the threshold where faction guards become a real problem.

NPC Behavior In Faction Territory: Will not attack first but will not help. Trade refused. Verbal warnings to leave.
Player Privileges: Cannot trade or accept contracts. Can attempt diplomacy but at -50% effectiveness.
Notes: The recoverable negative state. Most players sit here with one or two factions early in the game.

NPC Behavior In Faction Territory: Coexistence. Will trade at base prices. Will defend self only.
Player Privileges: Basic trade. Basic walk-in dialog. No contracts.
Notes: Starting state with all five factions for a new character.

NPC Behavior In Faction Territory: Greets player. Trade discount -10%. Faction guards will warn off other-faction hostiles in your radius.
NPC Behavior Outside Faction Territory: Friendly NPCs will share rumors and minor map intel.
Player Privileges: Standard contracts unlock. Faction-discounted recipes available at their vendors.
Notes: Reachable through normal play. The first ‘useful’ tier.

NPC Behavior In Faction Territory: Faction guards will intervene to defend you in their territory if attacked. Trade discount -20%.
NPC Behavior Outside Faction Territory: Friendly NPCs will warn you of incoming raids from other factions if they have intel.
Player Privileges: Special contracts unlock. Faction-signature gear recipes available.
Notes: Requires sustained reputation work — usually means doing 8-12 contracts and not crossing them.

NPC Behavior In Faction Territory: Faction patrols actively protect your claimed camps if within their territory. Free passage through gates. Trade discount -30%.
NPC Behavior Outside Faction Territory: Faction caravans visit your camp every 3-5 in-game days bearing small gifts.
Player Privileges: All faction recipes + signature gear + faction-specific perk slot unlocked.
Notes: Reaching Allied with a faction other than the one you pledged to requires a Diplomat hire and a Friendly tier with no Hostile factions adjacent.

NPC Behavior In Faction Territory: Faction NPCs salute you on sight. Faction will reinforce your camp during raids by other factions (one squad per raid). Trade -40%.
NPC Behavior Outside Faction Territory: The faction's banner colors appear on your guild flag if you display them.
Player Privileges: Unique cosmetic gear set + a named NPC champion of that faction will join you as a one-of-a-kind hire.
Notes: The terminal positive state. Maximum one Hero faction at a time. Reaching Hero with a second faction resets the first to Allied.
